title: Tashigi and Zoro Cross Paths
description: On pages 5–8, tashigi and zoro cross paths focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.
scene: On pages 5–8, tashigi and zoro cross paths focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That'll be good enough since I don't have any money right now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: that sword on his waist...z could it be...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: C-C-C-Could I M-M-Maybe see that s-s-s-s-word of yours...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Keep it cool now...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's with the stuttering...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ack!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is definitely...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: C... calm down! This is my big chance!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A dumb novice just happened to come in with a famous sword hanging on his waist so don't mess it up! Just play it cool...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Meh, it's no good. Just a piece of junk.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Sorry, I was lying just now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I know you're broke so let me propose something.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This sword you've got here certainly ain't no junk, but it's no masterpiece either. It's an above-average sword.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So I'll offer you 200,000 for this sword,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Meaning that you'll have 300,000 in total. With that much money, you can buy 3 decent swords at 100,000 apiece.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Huh? What're you talking about.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: N-No?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then... How about for 500,000!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Fine, you leave me with no choice.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just a little more...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll buy it for 650,000!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: HOOK, LINE, and S...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Listen Pal,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This sword isn't something for sale...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh! This sword!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Could it be!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't say it! Don't say it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: W... What's she doing here!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: "Wadou Ichimonji," right!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Wadou...!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Such a beautiful edge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Y-Y-Y-YES... I-it does H-H-happen to go by such a name... but it's still just a decent sword at best...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Decent!? Why, that's ridiculous! This is one of the 21 great- grade swords! It's famous!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Look! Look right here! It's a sword that can't be bought for any less than a million belli!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn it, woman! You've gone and told him everything!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I should sue you for obstruction of business!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!? Obstruction of Business!? I'm sorry, did I say something wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's just that... I've never seen such a fine sword before and...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You've come to pick up your "shigure," right!? Here, it's been polished already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah, I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah, I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A. Yes, I am a member of the

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hmph, I can't believe a timid girl like you carries around a high-grade sword...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The heck are you falling over there for!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Put all the swords back in their place and just leave already!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Looks like you got lucky because of that nosy girl.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's exactly as she says and it's a damn shame that a guy like you who doesn't even know its true value is its owner!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That sword is a master- work blade!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Those barrels back there are full of 50,000 belli- swords.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: So pick two you like and bring'em over here!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What's he so angry about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Didn't we meet earlier just now on the streets?

summary: This part gives Zoro a major equipment and character moment while Loguetown’s Marines begin to matter.
